Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xF2DF "AMAZONTALES-C000-F2DF" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Amazon Tales (TND - 2019).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $C000 which:
1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $C060 down to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this block contains the data for the press space sprite on the loading screen) 2. Sets up the correct VICII settings to display the loading screen 3. Copies the colour RAM data from $4328 (where it was present in the original game) to display the loading screen correctly 4. Sets the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) to disable highscore loading and saving to disk 5. Initialises the loading music by calling the routine at $1000
